From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1968 film

| The Longest Hunt | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Written by | Bruno Corbucci   [Mario Amendola](/wiki/Mario_Amendola "Mario Amendola") |
| Cinematography | Fausto Zuccoli |
| Music by | [Vasili Kojucharov](/w/index.php?title=Vasili_Kojucharov&action=edit&redlink=1 "Vasili Kojucharov (page does not exist)") |
| Release date | * 1968 (1968) |
| Country | Italy |
| Languages | Italian English |

***Spara, Gringo, spara*** (internationally released as ***The Longest Hunt*** and *Shoot, Gringo... Shoot!*) is a 1968 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") [Spaghetti Western](/wiki/Spaghetti_Western "Spaghetti Western") directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci").

It is the first western directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") (brother of western specialist [Sergio Corbucci](/wiki/Sergio_Corbucci "Sergio Corbucci")), and except the parodistic and bizarre *[The Three Musketeers of the West](/wiki/The_Three_Musketeers_of_the_West "The Three Musketeers of the West")* it is his only western.[[1]](#cite_note-sed-1) The title song "Rainbow... vorrei... vorrei" is performed by [Little Tony](/wiki/Little_Tony_(singer) "Little Tony (singer)").[[1]](#cite_note-sed-1) [Alex Cox](/wiki/Alex_Cox "Alex Cox") in his book *10,000 Ways to Die* refers to the film as "derivative and boring", "a reminder that talent as a director is not inheritable, or a family trait."[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Longest_Hunt&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

US-American adventurer Stark has been sentenced to death in a Mexican village. A rich Mexican rancher saves him from getting hanged but he must return the favour by saving the rancher's son Fidel. He is told that Fidel has somehow been persuaded or even forced to join a gang. Stark shall bring Fidel back to his father. The American believes that the rancher is worried sick about his son's well-being. When he delivers Fidel he understands just on time that things are very different. The rancher intends to whitewash his honour by getting rid of Fidel because he's ashamed of having an illegitimate son.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Longest_Hunt&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Brian Kelly](/wiki/Brian_Kelly_(actor) "Brian Kelly (actor)") as Stark
* [Keenan Wynn](/wiki/Keenan_Wynn "Keenan Wynn") as Major Charlie Doneghan
* [Erika Blanc](/wiki/Erika_Blanc "Erika Blanc") as Jocelyn
* [Folco Lulli](/wiki/Folco_Lulli "Folco Lulli") as Don Hernando Gutierrez
* [Fabrizio Moroni](/w/index.php?title=Fabrizio_Moroni&action=edit&redlink=1 "Fabrizio Moroni (page does not exist)") as Fidel
* [Linda Sini](/wiki/Linda_Sini "Linda Sini") as Dona Sol Gutierrez
* [Krista Nell](/wiki/Krista_Nell "Krista Nell") as Sheila
* [Rik Battaglia](/wiki/Rik_Battaglia "Rik Battaglia") as Cpt. Norton
* [Luigi Bonos](/wiki/Luigi_Bonos "Luigi Bonos") as Sgt. Peck
* [Enzo Andronico](/wiki/Enzo_Andronico "Enzo Andronico") as Gunther
* [Ignazio Leone](/wiki/Ignazio_Leone "Ignazio Leone") as Doctor
* [Luca Sportelli](/wiki/Luca_Sportelli "Luca Sportelli")
